title: Colorado QB Ponder dies in single-car crash at 23
content: Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder died early Sunday morning in a single-car crash, according to police. He was 23.

title: Leading scorer Baker-Mazara no longer with USC
content: Chad Baker-Mazara is no longer a member of the men's basketball program, USC announced, a day after he left the Trojans' loss to Nebraska.

title: Reddick wins 3rd straight to make NASCAR history
content: Tyler Reddick became the first driver in NASCAR Cup Series history to win the first three races of the season with a victory Sunday at the Circuit of the Americas.

title: Sources: Vikings to trade or cut Jones, Hargrave
content: The Vikings have informed running back Aaron Jones and defensive tackle Javon Hargrave that, barring a trade, they will be released at the start of the 2026 league year, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Curry (knee) sidelined at least five more games
content: Warriors star Stephen Curry will sit out at least the next five games because of his persistent right knee issue, the team announced Sunday.

title: Echavarria wins Cognizant after Lowry collapse
content: Nico Echavarria, who was three shots back with three holes left, shot a 5-under 66 on Sunday to win at PGA National, finishing at 17-under 267 and beating Shane Lowry, who had two double bogeys in his final three holes.

title: Iran federation says participation in WC in doubt
content: The president of Iran's soccer federation says he does not know if the national team can play World Cup matches in the United States following the surprise U.S. and Israeli bombardment of his country.

title: Takeaways: Only one surprising outcome at Elimination Chamber
content: The title matchups for WrestleMania 42 are nearly set, but there is only one pairing that we didn't see coming.

title: Heaps, Shaw lead USWNT to win over Argentina
content: Lindsey Heaps had a goal and an assist, and Jaedyn Shaw also scored to propel the United States to a sixth straight shutout victory with a 2-0 win over Argentina in the SheBelieves Cup on Sunday.

title: New intel on the QB market, potential trades and top NFL free agents: What we heard at the combine
content: What will the Vikings, Cardinals, Colts and Dolphins do at QB? Has the A.J. Brown and Maxx Crosby trade buzz quieted? Which free agents are getting interest?

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Ohio State improves its chances, Indiana doesn't
content: A mixed Big Ten Sunday gives bubble teams Ohio State and Indiana different outlooks on their at-large cases.

title: Arsenal riding corner kicks to title; Chelsea red card problems continue
content: Arsenal may be the most dominant corner-kick team the Premier League has ever seen. Meanwhile, Chelsea keep hurting themselves with red cards.

title: Man United go third as Sesko continues hot streak of crucial goals
content: United are flying and so is Benjamin Sesko, whose latest effort was a game winner against Crystal Palace.

title: Your guide to the Unrivaled playoffs: Breeze and Vinyl advance to semifinals
content: The Phantom will face the Vinyl and the Mist play the Breeze in the semifinals on Monday in Brooklyn.

title: Inside the secret history of the black mamba
content: In late 2002, Nike began creating a global campaign featuring the black mamba -- and presented it to an NBA superstar. That star was not Kobe Bryant.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Betting buzz: Kon Knueppel overtakes Cooper Flagg as NBA Rookie of the Year favorite
content: Kon Knueppel's hot play has shaken up the Rookie of the Year odds, as the Hornets' star passes Cooper Flagg as the favorite.

title: Hannah Green hangs on for second LPGA Singapore title
content: Hannah Green nearly opened the door for a fast-finishing Auston Kim but held on to win the HSBC Women's World Championship by one stroke.

title: Transfer rumors, news: MLS an option as Salah 'increasingly likely' to leave Liverpool
content: MLS and the Saudi Pro League are both "possible options" for Liverpool's Mohamed Salah this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Oil Prices Rise By 8% Amid Middle East Conflict
content: Oil prices rose sharply when market trading began Sunday, as U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran and retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. military installations around the Gulf sent disruptions through the global energy supply chain.

title: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates: Israel, Hezbollah Exchange Fire As Regional Tensions Escalate
content: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates: Israel and Hezbollah traded fire, while President Donald Trump vowed to avenge the deaths of US service members and said the war with Iran could last for weeks.

title: Trump Calls Iran Strike As "Largest, Most Complex Military Offensives"
content: Donald Trump called the sweeping American military assault on Iran "one of the largest, most complex, most overwhelming military offensives the world has ever seen," declaring that Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead.

title: "Reconsider Travel": US Raises Bahrain, Qatar Advisories Amid Iran Conflict
content: The United States raised its travel advisories for Bahrain and Qatar to Level 3 in the aftermath of the launch of US combat operations in Iran, citing security risks and potential disruptions across the Middle East.

title: Israeli Strikes Target Beirut Suburbs: Report
content: Israeli strikes were launched at Beirut's southern suburbs on Monday, Lebanese state media reported, as Hezbollah said it fired rockets and drones at Israel.

title: Crash That Killed Ajit Pawar Was One Of Many: NDTV Checks 10-Year Data
content: In 2016, an air ambulance operating from Patna to Delhi went down in Najafgarh. Unlike the Red Airways crash that killed all seven on board, everyone in this accident survived. The pilots were hailed as heroes for averting a disaster.

title: Rumble In The Strait Of Hormuz To Jolt Markets Today? See Details
content: The US and Israel's joint strikes on Iran and the response by the Islamic nation, whose supreme leader Ayatollah Khamenei was killed, have triggered anxiety among investors, worried about the effects the conflict would have on the markets today.

title: "Combat Ops To Continue Until All Objectives Achieved": Trump On Iran
content: US President Donald Trump warned on Sunday that combat operations in Iran were continuing and would carry on until all of Washington's objectives are achieved.

title: Safety Of Civilians "Utmost Priority," PM Modi Tells Israeli PM Netanyahu
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has spoken with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to discuss the current regional situation and emphasised the need to ensure the safety of civilians as a priority.

title: US Can Use British Military Bases For Iran Missile Strikes: UK PM Starmer
content: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said on Sunday that his country has accepted a U.S. request to use British bases for defensive strikes against Iranian missiles in storage depots or launchers.

title: US Says 3 Troops Killed, 5 Seriously Wounded During Iran Attacks
content: Three American service members have been killed and five others seriously wounded during the US attacks on Iran, the military announced Sunday.

title: 6 Injured In Jerusalem After Iran Missile Barrage: Report
content: Israel's Magen David Adom emergency services said they were treating six people with injuries in the Jerusalem area on Sunday after the latest salvo of missiles fired from Iran.

title: As Israel Bombs Tehran, 'Series Of Blasts' Over Jerusalem
content: A series of loud blasts were heard above Jerusalem following sirens on Sunday evening, AFP journalists reported, after the Israeli military said it had detected missiles launched from Iran.

title: "Cut Off Snake's Head": US Says Destroyed Iran's Guards Headquarters
content: The United States military has confirmed the destruction of the headquarters of Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) in a large-scale strike.

title: 2 Ministers, Team India Cricketer "Under Adjudication" For Bengal Voter List
content: The Special Intensive Revision of voter lists in West Bengal is almost at an end after a rigorous four-month process, but the fates of many remain undecided.

title: PM Modi Chairs High-Level Security Meet Over Iran-Israel Situation
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday night chaired a meeting of the Cabinet Committee on Security, the highest decision-making body on security and strategic matters of the country.

title: Srinagar's Lal Chowk Sealed Off Amid Protests Over Khamenei's Death
content: Restrictions are being imposed in Srinagar and several other parts of Kashmir to prevent the spread of protests against the killing of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

title: Satellite Pics Show Black Smoke Over Dubai Skyline As Iran Attacks Continue
content: On February 24, satellite imagery of Dubai showed ordered highways, glittering towers and artificial islands. By March 1, the picture had changed.

title: Adani Group To Make India's Longest Wind Turbine Blade
content: India will make its longest onshore wind turbine blades at 91.2 metres as Adani New Industries Ltd (ANIL) scales up production at its Mundra facility in Gujarat.

title: Adani Group Confirms Israel-Based Haifa Port Fully Secure, Operational
content: The Adani group on Sunday said its Haifa port in Israel is fully secure and in operational condition amid heightened military conflict in Iran.

title: Middle East on the boil: What does it mean for India’s trade, exports, crude oil & LPG supply?
content: Exporters have raised strong concerns that the conflict could disrupt shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, both of which are crucial maritime corridors.

title: 'This is the day I was waiting for': Sanju Samson's emotional confession
content: Sanju Samson described his match-winning performance as a dream come true, a culmination of years battling self-doubt. He credits extensive experience, both playing and observing cricketing greats, for his ability to handle pressure. Samson emphasized adapting to match situations and focusing on his role rather than milestones, finding solace in the present moment to overcome lingering uncertainties.

title: After signing Pentagon deal, Sam Altman to Silicon Valley: You have double standards
content: OpenAI has secured a contract with the Department of War for classified network deployment, following a period of intense scrutiny. CEO Sam Altman defended the move, emphasizing long-standing discussions and the need to support the government's mission. He also criticized tech giants for demanding government action against China while refusing to assist, highlighting a perceived double standard.

title: Suspect in YouTuber Saleem Wastik stabbing killed in UP encounter
content: A Rs 1 lakh reward was placed on Zeeshan, accused in the attack on YouTuber Saleem Wastik, who was killed in a police encounter in Loni. Zeeshan allegedly stabbed Wastik multiple times. His associate escaped during the shootout where two head constables were injured. Police are investigating motives including personal enmity and ideological differences.

title: Dominiq Ponder dies at 23: Colorado QB’s sudden death shocks NFL
content: Colorado football mourns the tragic loss of quarterback Dominiq Ponder, who died at 23 on March 1, 2026. He was one of the budding stars of the Colorado team. His sudden death was confirmed by Deion Sanders. As per reports, he died due to an accident. The accident, involving a Tesla that lost control and caught fire, sent shockwaves through the team. Coach Deion Sanders and teammates remembered Ponder for his positive energy and leadership, highlighting his promising, albeit brief, career.

title: CEO of America's largest bank Jamie Dimon says: We have displaced people for AI, and ...
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon urges businesses and governments to prepare for AI-driven labor disruption, emphasizing proactive planning over reactive measures.  The bank is embracing AI, already redeploying employees displaced by its adoption, and Dimon advocates for phased AI integration and retraining incentives to mitigate societal impact.

title: Lunar Eclipse 2026: Date and time in India, significance of the Chandra Grahan 2026
content: A total lunar eclipse, known as Chandra Grahan, will occur on March 3, 2026, coinciding with the vibrant Hindu festival of Holi. This rare celestial event, where the Moon will appear red, will be visible in India and across various regions, offering a unique spectacle for skygazers.

title: Shimron Hetmyer creates T20 World Cup history, sets all-time record vs India
content: Shimron Hetmyer has created a new record for hitting the most sixes in a single T20 World Cup edition. He smashed 19 sixes, surpassing Sahibzada Farhan. Hetmyer's powerful hitting has been a highlight for the West Indies. The article also mentions other notable six-hitters from past tournaments. India secured a semifinal spot after a thrilling chase against the West Indies.

title: West Asia conflict: Govt keeps tabs on crude prices & goods movement
content: India is closely monitoring West Asian tensions for potential economic impacts, particularly on oil prices and goods movement. While immediate effects on the current financial year's budget are unlikely, prolonged conflict could disrupt critical supplies and necessitate longer shipping routes, affecting trade.

title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: I was shocked to find China's Huawei has hired engineers who can...
content: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan expressed shock at Huawei's 100+ top CPU architects, developing alternatives to advanced tools and lithography. He warned China is rapidly closing the semiconductor gap through engineering and infrastructure optimization, even excelling in older tech. Tan also highlighted China's regulatory speed and the US trailing in open-source AI development, urging immediate action to maintain its chip advantage.

title: Why floor plan matters more than square footage in real estate
content: Property layouts are transforming, shifting from large square footage to open-concept designs driven by evolving individual aspirations and hybrid work models. This trend prioritizes employee well-being and community building, leading to cost savings for companies and enhanced living spaces for individuals. Developers are experimenting with innovative floor plans to cater to these changing demands.

title: Delhi quadruple murder: How a call from lender triggered tragic chain of events
content: A Delhi man, Munchun Kewat, allegedly murdered his wife and three young daughters after a heated phone call with a lender demanding repayment of a significant debt. Kewat, a gambler facing financial ruin, reportedly used a newly purchased knife to commit the heinous crime before attempting to flee. He was apprehended by police in Kishangarh.

title: Truck swerves, delivery agent crushed by wheels in Gurgaon; driver arrested
content: A fatal accident in Udyog Vihar claimed the life of 25-year-old delivery executive Krishna after his motorcycle skidded and he was struck by a truck's wheels. He reportedly swerved to avoid the heavy vehicle, which allegedly turned suddenly. Passersby alerted authorities, and he was rushed to a hospital where he was pronounced dead.

title: Candace Owens’ bride of Charlie: Erika Kirk claims spark buzz
content: Candace Owens has made fresh claims in her “Bride of Charlie” series about Erika Kirk’s dating history and Charlie Kirk’s alleged private fears. Reports from RadarOnline, The Blast, International Business Times UK, and PrimeTimer highlight her comments. The claims have sparked debate, with questions raised about timelines, past image, and private conversations.

title: Angel Reese reacts as brother Julian signs two-way deal with Wizards
content: The Washington Wizards have signed rookie forward Julian Reese to a two-way contract, bringing him closer to his NBA debut. Reese, brother of WNBA star Angel Reese, previously played for the Raptors' G League affiliate. His sister expressed immense pride in his journey. Reese could potentially play against his former organization soon.

title: Charles Leclerc’s wife Alexandra Saint Mleux adopts new surname after wedding
content: It has now been confirmed that Formula 1 star Charles Leclerc tied the knot with his fiancee Alexandra Saint Mleux in Monaco around this weekend. The couple's post-wedding drive in a vintage red Ferrari in Monaco went viral. Now Alexandra has confirmed their wedding by changing her surname on Instagram along with a cute picture on her Instagram Stories.

title: Sanju Samson scripts history, rewrites record books to surpass Virat Kohli
content: Sanju Samson delivered a historic unbeaten 97, the highest T20 World Cup chase score by an Indian, to guide the team to a thrilling victory against the West Indies. His magnificent 50-ball innings, featuring 12 fours and four sixes, powered India to their record successful chase, securing a semi-final spot.

title: How Jennifer Lopez stays strong and sculpted at 56 with smart strength training
content: Jennifer Lopez, at 56, showcases how building muscle post-50 combats age-related muscle loss, keeping her youthful and energetic. Her rigorous training, blending weight circuits and core work, alongside a high-protein diet, fuels her vitality.

title: Fans accuse Taylor Swift of London trip to meet Joe Alwyn amid Kelce romance
content: Fans online have sparked fresh controversy by linking Taylor Swift’s recent lyrics and London visit to ex Joe Alwyn, dragging Travis Kelce into the debate. Social media theories question her artistic references and current relationship, though no evidence supports the claims. The episode highlights how Swift’s storytelling and high-profile romance continue to fuel speculation and intense fan scrutiny.

title: 'How much can one person endure?' Kin blames SIR as BLO ‘under adjudication’ dies in Kolkata
content: A booth level officer, Mohammad Tahir, has died of a heart attack. His family alleges that immense work pressure and harassment from voters contributed to his death. Tahir was reportedly stressed after his own name appeared on an 'under adjudication' list. He collapsed outside his home and was declared brought dead at a hospital.

title: Ice-cool Sanju Samson fires India into T20 World Cup semis
content: Pace or spin, Sanju Samson took the West Indies down with aplomb and never lost shape in the process. He hit the ball where it was meant to be hit but his ice-cool nerves stood out during his 50-ball 97*, which included 12 boundaries and four sixes. India will now face England in the T20 World Cup semi-final at Wankhede Stadium.

title: Don’t celebrate yet, case will go to Delhi HC, says CM Rekha Gupta on court relief for Kejriwal
content: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta attacked Arvind Kejriwal, stating his "pot of deceit" won't work again and he's guilty in the eyes of Delhi's people. She highlighted alleged scams and the BJP government's focus on development and direct benefit transfers, contrasting it with AAP's alleged lack of progress.

title: US-Israel strike Iran: With homeland under attack, Iran women chase FIFA World Cup dream
content: Football authorities are supporting Iran's women's team at the Women's Asian Cup in Australia following recent military strikes in Iran. The Asian Football Confederation is monitoring the situation and prioritizing the safety of all involved. The Iranian team aims to showcase their abilities and qualify for the World Cup.

title: 'They want to talk, and I agreed': Trump claims Iran seeking dialogue
content: President Trump stated in an interview that Iran's new leadership wants to talk, and he has agreed to discussions. He expressed confidence in an upcoming uprising, noting celebrations among Iranians and expatriates. Trump also indicated he would assess support for any potential uprising at the time it occurs.

title: Pakistan, Venezuela & now Iran: Why Chinese-made weapons keep failing
content: Recent conflicts have exposed troubling vulnerabilities in Chinese weaponry. Pakistan's air defenses buckled against Indian missiles, Venezuela's radars went dark during a US raid, and Iran's systems faltered under airstrikes—patterns that point to shoddy engineering and weak software. Taken together, these incidents suggest systemic quality-control problems that erode buyer confidence and fuel a credibility crisis for China's arms industry.

title: America First, Diplomacy Last: The Peace President who went to war
content: Donald Trump, once a critic of 'endless wars,' now presides over a presidency marked by muscular interventions.  His second term features forceful actions in Venezuela and Iran, alongside territorial ambitions towards Greenland.  This shift from a 'peace president' to one employing high-stakes brinkmanship redefines 'America First' as forceful global reshaping, aiming for dominance rather than negotiated equilibrium.

title: What causes a Lunar Eclipse? Decoding the science behind it
content: A lunar eclipse occurs when Earth passes directly between the Sun and Moon, casting a shadow that darkens and reddens the lunar surface. This celestial event, a result of precise orbital alignment, happens only during a full moon when the three bodies align perfectly.

title: Almost all US military bases hit by Iran: Is America unable to protect its assets in Middle-East?
content: Following the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader, Tehran launched a wide-ranging retaliatory campaign targeting US and Israeli military assets across the Middle East. Multiple Gulf nations reported missile and drone attacks, with US Central Command confirming three American service members killed. The scale of the strikes raises questions about regional air defence capabilities and potential escalation.

title: Khamenei dead, Iranians flood streets: Trump wants protesters to ‘take over,' but can they?
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead, triggering celebrations and mourning across the nation. The US and Israel see this as an opportunity for regime change, while Iran's leadership signals escalation with retaliatory strikes. The country faces a critical juncture as popular anger clashes with the security apparatus's control.

title: Rashmika Mandanna, Vijay Deverakonda’s March 4 Hyderabad reception to remain strictly invite-only
content: Amid soaring excitement around the wedding of Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda, the couple’s team has confirmed that their March 4 reception in Hyderabad will remain a strictly invite-only event due to security reasons.

title: Israel-US strike on Iran: PCB confirms ODI match cancelled in Abu Dhabi
content: Security concerns in Abu Dhabi have led to the cancellation of the second unofficial one-day match between Pakistan Shaheens and England Lions. The England and Wales Cricket Board cited safety as their top priority, also delaying the England Women's team's trip. The disruption follows military strikes and missile fire in the region, causing airspace closures and flight cancellations.

title: Bubble watch: Where things stand as conference tourneys loom
content: six automatic bids to the NCAA tournament will be awarded to the winners of the six conference tournaments . championship games will be scheduled for March 20 and March 21 . ten more teams will earn at-large spots determined by the NPI formula .

title: Ranking MLB's best at every position for 2026: Olney's top 10s
content: ESPN's Buster Olney surveyed players around the industry to help him rank the top 10 players at every position . the objective of this exercise is to identify the best players for the 2026 season, not who might be best in five years or over their career .

title: 🏀 Win caps LeBron's father-daughter road trip
content: the lakers beat the Golden State Warriors 129-101 . leBron James was the first father-daughter road trip of his 23 years in the league . he said he was "good luck charm right here, 1-0" the first loss was a botched final play .

title: Knicks end Spurs' streak with 'high-level' defense
content: the Knicks snap the Spurs' 11-game winning streak in a rematch of the NBA Cup final . they held San Antonio to a season-low output in the 114-89 win . the defense was "high level," coach Mike brown says .

title: Sunday at the combine: Draft experts pick risers, standouts at every position
content: the offensive line prospects in the 2026 draft class had their on-field workouts at Lucas Oil Stadium . the top quarterbacks, running backs and wide receivers worked out Saturday . draft experts recapped all four days of the combine workouts .

title: 'Conveyed India's concerns over recent developments': PM Modi speaks to Israel's Netanyahu
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics. The TOI News Desk is your trusted source for staying informed and connected to the ever-evolving global landscape, ensuring that our readers are equipped with the latest developments that matter most." Read More

title: Madhya Pradesh CM Yadav releases gharials, turtles at Kuno National Park
content: Nine cheetahs airlifted from Botswana were released into the national park on Saturday, taking their number to 48

title: Will leverage tech to crack down on market manipulators, says SEBI chief
content: SEBI Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey says the market regulator is using AI to reach out to more investors for awareness; he urges people to use tools such as SEBI Check to deter fraudsters and warns against financial influencers promising astronomical returns; he says SEBI will make sure there is no instability in the markets

title: PM Modi speaks with Netanyahu to discuss current regional situation in West Asia
content: PM Modi reiterated the need for an end of hostilities in West Asia following the U.S.-Israeli joint attack on Iran

title: Chief Minister to inaugurate Critical Care Block in Jawadhu Hills
content: Health officials said that the new single-storey facility, which will cover around 5,000 sq.ft, has 50 beds with separate wards for maternity, newborn care, and in-patients

title: Killing of Khamenei and attack on Iran signal the revival of regime-change doctrine and coercive unilateralism: Kharge
content: The Congress president stresses targeted killing of a sitting head of state strikes at the heart of international rules; sovereignty is not conditional, and political legitimacy cannot be manufactured through force, he asserts.

title: ‘India stands in solidarity’: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, condemns attacks on Gulf nation
content: PM Modi also thanked the UAE President for taking care of the Indian community living in the Gulf nation, and said New Delhi supports de-escalation, regional peace, security and stability

title: A map to guide you to places in Bengaluru where pink Tabebuia are in full bloom
content: The bloom-tracking system works through a community-driven model supported by two data sources: GBA’s census data and user contributions

title: Fire breaks out at Nellore GGH, no casualties reported
content: Short-circuit in maternity ward triggers blaze; patients shifted to other blocks and private hospital as Collector and SP oversee relief measures

title: Indians among those injured in Iranian strikes, says UAE
content: Ongoing conflict between U.S.-Israel alliance and Iran send waves across West Asia; oil tanker with Indians among crew hit off Oman, passengers stranded as flight disruptions; 8 Indians stuck in Karachi airport after aircraft diversion over the conflict

title: 463 trees of 34 species: Cost of Orange Line Metro realignment in Nagarabhavi
content: According to the original plan, the initial alignment passed along the Outer Ring Road, from Dwaraka Nagar station to Chowdeshwari Nagar station, which residents claimed will have resulted in at least 90% less environmental destruction

title: BJP begins campaign for Bengal Assembly elections with Parivartan Yatras
content: Senior party leaders flag off four Parivartan Yatras in four different corners of the State. On March 2, five more will be flagged off in the State. All nine yatras will conclude with a public rally of Prime Minister Narendra Modi at Kolkata’s Brigade Parade Grounds

title: Opposition parties condemn killing of Iran's leader Khamenei as ‘immoral, unlawful’
content: In Jammu and Kashmir, various parties, including the ruling National Conference, also deplored the U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran

title: Amit Shah asks Punjab govt. to act against ‘religious conversions’
content: Amit Shah invokes the sacrifice of Guru Tegh Bahadur while addressing the ‘Hind-Di-Chadar’ event to mark the 350th martyrdom anniversary of Guru Tegh Bahadur in Kharghar

title: Indian airlines cancel 350 flights to West Asia and beyond
content: The UAE announces it will cover accommodation and sustenance costs for stranded passengers in the wake of the war between Israel-U.S. and Iran

title: Maharashtra-Canada ties poised for dynamic growth: Fadnavis
content: At Mumbai reception for Canadian leaders, Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis pitches State as hub for infrastructure, AI, climate finance, and higher education investment.

title: INFINITUS 2026 concludes on a high note at SRM University A.P.
content: Over 6,500 students from across the country take part in four-day techno-cultural extravaganza featuring performances by Karthik and Jonita Gandhi

title: Congress slams Vijayawada MP over stalled flyovers, bypass
content: Kolanukonda Shivaji seeks action on Singh Nagar and Nidamanuru corridor projects amid worsening traffic congestion

title: MHA cautions States against possible violence in the wake of U.S.-Israel military strikes against Iran
content: As thousands took to the streets to protest Khamenei’s killing, MHA asked States to watch protests by friends and foes of the Iranian regime, monitor radicals; says likely targets are embassies, tourist sites

title: GBA and BDA to draft separate Revised Master Plan
content: The new draft is only expected in 2027, which will be 12 years after the last Revised Master Plan was due. The master plan in force was drafted in 2005.

title: ‘Sleaze’ video: TTD Chairman B.R. Naidu warns of action against those resorting to smear campaign
content: He dismissed as uncivilised the attempts of YSRCP leader Bhumana Karnunakar Reddy to tarnish his image

title: Kerala Chief Minister’s moment with young landslide survivor takes political turn
content: The child had gained national attention after Prime Minister’s interaction with her during his visit to a hospital in Wayanad soon after the Mundakkai-Chooralmala landslides

title: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant stresses on building a ‘mediation culture’ for resolving disputes amicably
content: It is gaining greater acceptance as an effective tool for dispute resolution, and the process has statutory backup in the Mediation Act of 2023, he observes; Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu urges the CJI to consider establishing National Judicial Academy in Amaravati

title: Kakani, Somireddy trade charges over ₹100 crore land row in Nellore
content: YSRCP leader alleges sale of 40 acres of government land worth ₹100 crore; Sarvepalli MLA denies charge, says disputed land will be handed over to NUDA for NTR Township development

title: Work on beach circuit project linking Kuzhipilly, Cherai and Munambam begins
content: The long-awaited circuit was initially proposed in 2017 as part of a broader plan to promote beach tourism in Ernakulam district

title: Heavy rush at Kanaka Durga temple, arrangements in place for Maha Kumbhabhishekam
content: Preparations in full swing for Maha Kumbhabhishekam, a grand ritual held once every 12 years at Sri Durga Malleswara Swamy Devasthanam; the three-day event is scheduled from March 6 to 8 this year

title: Andhra Pradesh achieves record GST collection in February 2026
content: The 5.45% growth compared to February 2025 signals a robust economic trajectory despite significant tax cuts introduced under the GST 2.0, says official

title: Left parties condemn military action by U.S. and Israel on Iran
content: It is a grave violation of international law and Iranian sovereignty, they say, and demand the Government of India to condemn the strikes

title: CPI(M) general secretary M.A. Baby condemns U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran, killing of Khamenei
content: Indian Union Muslim League leader Sayyid Munavar Ali Shihab Thangal pays tribute to Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the attack

title: KSRTC rolls out major reforms
content: Transport Minister K.B. Ganesh Kumar reveals that the corporation is shifting toward more passenger-centric services

title: Courts must instil confidence in public on delivery of justice: CJI
content: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant lays foundation stone for a new court complex at Daminedu, Tirupati rural mandal

title: Police, MVD uncover bid to alter details of stolen vehicles
content: It was the Marad police who recently detected a stolen vehicle with a fake registration number and a tampered chassis, suggesting that more gangs may be operating in the illegal trade

title: Government failed to ensure MSP for farmers, alleges YSRCP
content: Citing the distress among chickpea and maize farmers, YSRCP leader Nagi Reddy accuses the government of  making false statements in the Assembly, besides flagging delays in completing the e-crop registration process

title: Bengal’s Muslim districts have highest number of cases awaiting adjudication under SIR
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee will sit on a dharna against the Election Commission of India, on March 6 in Kolkata

title: V-P launches remote-controlled drone-based tranquillizer system in Thrissur
content: The drone is equipped with a capture gun, tranquillizer syringe and medication, all operated remotely. Capable of functioning from a distance of up to 500 metres, the system ensures enhanced safety for wildlife experts, assisting personnel and the public during high-risk operations

title: Universal Health Scheme a sham, alleges APCC president Y. S. Sharmila
content: It is a conspiracy to kill Aarogyasri, she alleges, and accuses the TDP-led coalition government of preparing the ground for privatising the health scheme

title: Phase I of Wayanad township inaugurated, keys handed over to 178 families
content: CM says the construction of houses for the remaining beneficiaries is nearing completion and the keys are expected to be handed over before the next monsoon

title: Vice-President C.P. Radhakrishnan lays foundation stone of Chetana Ganashram in Thrissur
content: Vice-President appreciates vision of Chetana Ganashram as an eco-friendly music campus dedicated to music meditation and therapy

title: BJP OBCs Morcha plans to stage protest in Kalaburagi on March 16
content: Agitators to lay a siege to Deputy Commissioner’s office seeking the removal of district in-charge Minister Priyank Kharge

title: Escalation in West Asia can disrupt global oil markets and affect India’s economy, says CPI leader Narayana
content: Slamming the ‘authoritarian’ policy of the U.S., the CPI leader calls for balanced diplomacy, rooted in peace and mutual respect

title: Kakinada cracker blast exposes how systemic lapses led to a second tragedy in barely five months
content: Most of the rules prescribed by the two-member inquiry committee constituted by the government after the Konaseema firecracker accident in October last had reportedly not been followed by the ill-fated cracker unit in Kakinada

title: YSRCP demands resignation of TTD Chairman B.R. Naidu
content: individual facing moral allegations is unfit to hold a sacred and responsible position associated with the Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, says senior party leader Bhumana Karunakar Reddy

title: PM Modi chairs CCS meeting; West Asia situation, stranded Indians discussed
content: It is believed that the meeting discussed the safety of Indian nationals living in West Asia, and also those who are stranded, and how to deal with the situation if it deteriorates, the sources said

title: Ahmedabad: Class 12 boy locked in room by girlfriend’s family dies of suicide
content: the girl, a class 10 board student and from the same school as the boy, was alone at home as her father had stepped out to see her hospitalized mother . her father returned unexpectedly, found the boy inside, reprimanded both, and then locked him in a room and calling his family . the boy allegedly used a sari to hang himself from the ceiling fan .

title: 'Deeply regret', says Harvard for 'Hinduphobic' Sanskrit post
content: the university has issued a formal apology after a social media post promoting its Elementary Sanskrit course triggered sharp criticism from sections of the Hindu community . the artwork used in the post labelled "Hinduphobic" and culturally insensitive, the university said in a statement posted on its website on febr 27 .

title: PM Modi reviews West Asia situation, evacuation after attacks subside
content: PM Narendra Modi spoke with president sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan . he condemned the attacks and condoled the loss of lives in the attacks . Modi didn’t name Iran, which has launched hundreds of projectiles at the UAE in retaliation for the US-Israel strikes .
